message:
fix: align IsBlocked blocker reporting with blocked-cache semantics (GH-1524)

IsBlocked now queries all blocking dependency types (blocks, waits-for,
conditional-blocks) in a single query, consistent with computeBlockedIDs.
Previously, conditional-blocks were detected as blocked but returned no
blocker IDs, allowing the close guard to be bypassed since it checks
blocked && len(blockers) > 0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
